charter: When continuous mode finds no derivable implementation work, PM must convert the durable vision into the next concrete implementation-ready product increment rather than treating the project as complete.
acceptance_contract: PM identifies a specific product gap from VISION.md beyond completed docs/launch work
PM updates roadmap or system-spec with an implementation-ready increment
Increment includes concrete acceptance criteria and recommended owner/phase
No product claims exceed current implementation truth

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval

archived_reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
